'''Davirien''' was a [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] owned by the [[Chiewab Amalgamated Pharmaceuticals Company]]. Chiewab used the planet for research, and also permitted the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to use the planet for training missions.

{{Planet-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
